short: A running vehicle engine with persistent background distortion.
Mechanical operation noise featuring engine sounds and interference.
Motorized vehicle activity with audio artifacts.
long: A sustained vehicle engine sound dominates the recording, accompanied by significant background noise and audio degradation. No speech or musical elements are present.
Continuous mechanical operation noise with prominent distortion and no discernible secondary elements.
Persistent motorized activity featuring engine sounds and poor recording quality.
sound: Mechanical operation sounds consistent with vehicle activity
Engine noise characteristic of motorized transport
environment: Poor quality recording with significant background interference
